response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. The first ~4 minutes consist of dialogue and announcements by Hololive Gamers. Identified the song starting at 04:32.100 as 'Kawaii-sa, Harmony-sa'. Searched for the lyrics but none were returned via the tool. Provided the song title, performers, and scene breakdown in the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A segment of a concert featuring the virtual YouTuber group 'Hololive Gamers' (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) giving announcements about merchandise, collaborations, and figures, followed by a brief musical performance of 'Kawaii-sa, Harmony-sa'.

scenes.description: The group of four virtual YouTubers, 'Hololive Gamers', are standing on a concert stage, giving announcements, talking, and interacting with the audience about merchandise and collaborations. Background music is purely instrumental.

The group starts performing a song titled 'Kawaii-sa, Harmony-sa'. Each character is singing, and the audience is cheering with glowsticks. Text on screen identifies the song as 'Kawaii-sa, Harmony-sa'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive Gamers (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone)
